mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0511_02-03#Sql001 */ SBC.TITLE , SBC.CATEGORY , SBC.STATUS , SBC.SUGGESTION , LPAD(SBC.SBC_NO, 6, '0') AS SBC_NO , SBC.FILE1 AS ATTACH_FILE1 , SBC.FILE2 AS ATTACH_FILE2 , SBC.FILE3 AS ATTACH_FILE3 , SBCA.SBCA_NO AS ANSWER_NO , SBCA.ANSWER_DATE AS ANSWER_REGISTER_DATE , SBCA.ANSWER_UPDATE_DATE , SBCA.ANSWER AS ANSWER_CONTENTS FROM SUG_BOX_COMMON SBC LEFT JOIN SUG_BOX_COMMON_A SBCA ON SBC.SBC_NO = SBCA.SBC_NO WHERE SBC.SBC_NO = TO_NUMBER(#{req.sbcNo}) ORDER BY SBCA.SBCA_NO ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE /* @SQLID=SUB0511_02-03#Sql004 */ CORDYS.SUG_BOX_COMMON_A SET ANSWER_UPDATE_DATE = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMMDD') , ANSWER = #{req.answerContents} , UPDATE_TIME = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE , UPDATE_USER = #{req.userId} WHERE SBC_NO = TO_NUMBER(#{req.sbcNo}) AND SBCA_NO = TO_NUMBER(#{req.answerNo})
